description: This photograph depicts a "Garriga" landscape, characterized by sclerophyllous scrubs and dry grasses covering a gently sloping hillside under a clear blue sky. The vegetation is sparse, with patches of bare, dry ground visible between the bushes. In the background, rolling hills with similar vegetation patterns can be seen. The image is credited to the European Union, 2012 LUCAS, and is located in Catalonia, Spain. This land cover type corresponds to the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class 323, defined as sclerophyllous scrubs.
